note: The top-level execute() function was removed in Qiskit 1.0. Transpile first, then run on a backend: transpiled = transpile(circuit, backend); job = backend.run(transpiled). For expectation values / sampling prefer the Sampler/Estimator primitives.
qiskit.BasicAer was removed in 1.0. Use BasicSimulator from qiskit.providers.basic_provider, or AerSimulator from the qiskit-aer package.
The basicaer module was removed in 1.0; replaced by qiskit.providers.basic_provider.
bind_parameters was removed in 1.0. Use assign_parameters() as a drop-in replacement (it also supports inplace and additional features).
Aer is no longer re-exported from qiskit. Install qiskit-aer and import from qiskit_aer: from qiskit_aer import AerSimulator (or Aer).
qiskit.opflow was removed in 1.0. Use qiskit.quantum_info (SparsePauliOp, Statevector, Operator) together with the Estimator/Sampler primitives.
qiskit.algorithms was removed from qiskit in 1.0 and split into the standalone qiskit-algorithms package. Install it and import from qiskit_algorithms.
The qiskit.extensions module was removed in 1.0. The operations now live in qiskit.circuit.library (e.g. UnitaryGate, Initialize).
assemble()/Qobj were removed in 1.0. Pass transpiled QuantumCircuits directly to backend.run(); the Qobj intermediate no longer exists.
The QuantumCircuit.qasm() / Instruction.qasm() methods were removed in 1.0. Use qiskit.qasm2.dumps(circuit) / qiskit.qasm2.dump(circuit, file).
The pulse module was removed in Qiskit 2.0. There is no in-tree replacement; pulse-level programming moved out of core Qiskit. Code relying on qiskit.pulse cannot run on Qiskit 2.x.
qiskit.IBMQ was removed. Use the qiskit-ibm-runtime package: from qiskit_ibm_runtime import QiskitRuntimeService.
qiskit.tools (including job_monitor and parallel_map) was removed in 1.0. Poll job.status()/job.result() directly.
Snapshot fake backends (FakeProvider, FakeVigo, FakeTokyo, ...) were removed/reorganized. Use GenericBackendV2 to build a configurable fake backend.
Bare execute(circuit, backend) (imported from qiskit) was removed in 1.0. Use transpile(circuit, backend) then backend.run(transpiled), or the Sampler/Estimator primitives.

QuantumInstance was removed in 1.0. Algorithms now take primitives directly: use the Sampler/Estimator primitives (e.g. StatevectorSampler, StatevectorEstimator) instead of wrapping a backend in a QuantumInstance.

qiskit.aqua was removed during the metapackage dismantling (well before 1.0). Its contents split into application packages (qiskit-nature/optimization/machine-learning/finance); general algorithms now live in the standalone qiskit-algorithms package.

qiskit.ignis was removed during the metapackage dismantling. Characterization, verification and error-mitigation tooling moved to the standalone qiskit-experiments package (and mthree for measurement mitigation).
Importing from qiskit.providers.aer is no longer possible in 1.0. Install qiskit-aer and import from the top-level qiskit_aer package instead (drop-in): from qiskit_aer import AerSimulator.

The legacy qiskit.test.mock fake backends were removed. Device snapshot fakes moved to qiskit_ibm_runtime.fake_provider; for a configurable Qiskit-native fake use GenericBackendV2 from qiskit.providers.fake_provider.
The qiskit.tools.visualization legacy redirect was removed in 1.0. The visualization module has lived at qiskit.visualization since 0.8.0; update imports accordingly.
qiskit.tools was removed in 1.0; parallel_map was relocated to qiskit.utils. Import it as: from qiskit.utils import parallel_map.
The QuantumCircuit.cnot() alias was removed in 1.0. Use QuantumCircuit.cx() to append a controlled-X gate.
The QuantumCircuit.toffoli() alias was removed in 1.0. Use QuantumCircuit.ccx() (controlled-controlled-X).
The QuantumCircuit.mct() alias (multi-controlled Toffoli) was removed in 1.0. Use QuantumCircuit.mcx().
The QuantumCircuit.fredkin() alias was removed in 1.0. Use QuantumCircuit.cswap() (controlled-SWAP).
QuantumCircuit.snapshot() and the Snapshot instruction were removed in 1.0. Use qiskit-aer's save instructions instead, e.g. QuantumCircuit.save_statevector() after importing qiskit_aer.
PauliTable (and StabilizerTable) were deprecated in 0.43 and removed in 1.0. Use PauliList from qiskit.quantum_info instead.
The QuantumCircuit.diagonal() method was removed in 1.0. Append a DiagonalGate from qiskit.circuit.library instead: qc.append(DiagonalGate(diag), qubits).
The QuantumCircuit.squ() single-qubit-unitary method was removed in 1.0. Use QuantumCircuit.unitary() instead.

Deprecated in Qiskit 2.1 (removed in 3.0): the TwoLocal ansatz class became a builder function. Import as `from qiskit.circuit.library import n_local` and call n_local(...), which returns a QuantumCircuit. There is no `qiskit.circuit.library.two_local` submodule to import from.

Deprecated in Qiskit 2.1 (removed in 3.0): the EfficientSU2 class became a builder function. Import as `from qiskit.circuit.library import efficient_su2`. There is no `qiskit.circuit.library.efficient_su2` submodule to import from.
Deprecated in Qiskit 2.1 (removed in 3.0): use the builder function `from qiskit.circuit.library import real_amplitudes`.
Deprecated in Qiskit 2.1 (removed in 3.0): use the builder function `from qiskit.circuit.library import n_local` (applies to NLocal subclasses too).
Deprecated in Qiskit 2.1 (removed in 3.0): use `from qiskit.circuit.library import QFTGate` (a gate you append to a circuit), or qiskit.synthesis.synth_qft_full for a synthesized circuit.

The qiskit.chemistry application module (Qiskit Aqua era) was split out of the metapackage and is now the standalone qiskit-nature package. Install qiskit-nature and import from qiskit_nature (APIs were restructured too).
The qiskit.finance application module became the standalone qiskit-finance package. Install qiskit-finance and import from qiskit_finance.
The qiskit.optimization application module became the standalone qiskit-optimization package. Install qiskit-optimization and import from qiskit_optimization.
The qiskit.ml application module became the standalone qiskit-machine-learning package. Install qiskit-machine-learning and import from qiskit_machine_learning.

The legacy IBMQ provider (qiskit.providers.ibmq / qiskit-ibmq-provider) was removed. Use the standalone qiskit-ibm-runtime package: from qiskit_ibm_runtime import QiskitRuntimeService; service = QiskitRuntimeService(); backend = service.backend(...).

QSVM (kernel-based quantum SVM) moved out of the removed qiskit.aqua into qiskit-machine-learning and was renamed: classifier -> QSVC, regressor -> QSVR, Pegasos variant -> PegasosQSVC. Import as `from qiskit_machine_learning.algorithms import QSVC` (it now takes a quantum kernel, e.g. FidelityQuantumKernel).

VQC (variational quantum classifier) moved to qiskit-machine-learning: `from qiskit_machine_learning.algorithms import VQC` (use VQR for regression). The constructor signature changed (feature_map/ansatz/optimizer).
VQE moved to qiskit-algorithms (primitives-based): `from qiskit_algorithms import VQE`; it now takes an Estimator primitive instead of a QuantumInstance.
QAOA moved to qiskit-algorithms (primitives-based): `from qiskit_algorithms import QAOA`; takes a Sampler primitive instead of a QuantumInstance.
Aqua optimizers moved to qiskit-algorithms: `from qiskit_algorithms.optimizers import COBYLA, SPSA, ...`.
Grover moved to qiskit-algorithms: `from qiskit_algorithms import Grover` (+ AmplificationProblem).
Moved to qiskit-algorithms: `from qiskit_algorithms import AmplitudeEstimation` (+ EstimationProblem); primitives-based.
Moved to qiskit-algorithms: `from qiskit_algorithms import IterativeAmplitudeEstimation`.
Moved to qiskit-algorithms: `from qiskit_algorithms import NumPyMinimumEigensolver`.
Moved to qiskit-algorithms: `from qiskit_algorithms import NumPyEigensolver`.
Aqua feature maps were ported to the circuit library: `from qiskit.circuit.library import ZZFeatureMap, ZFeatureMap, PauliFeatureMap`.
Aqua variational forms were ported to the circuit library (e.g. RYRZ/RY -> the n_local builders): `from qiskit.circuit.library import efficient_su2, real_amplitudes, n_local`.
Aqua operators -> qiskit.opflow (also later removed) -> use qiskit.quantum_info: `from qiskit.quantum_info import SparsePauliOp` for Pauli operators.
Shor's algorithm was dropped in the Aqua split and has no maintained replacement in qiskit-algorithms.
The HHL linear solver was dropped in the Aqua split (a tutorial-grade version briefly lived in qiskit-algorithms, then removed); no maintained replacement.
QGAN moved to qiskit-machine-learning and was subsequently removed; no current drop-in replacement.

Aqua uncertainty models (NormalDistribution, LogNormalDistribution, GaussianConditionalIndependenceModel, ...) moved to qiskit-finance: `from qiskit_finance.circuit.library import NormalDistribution, LogNormalDistribution`.

The V1 Sampler was removed in 2.0. Use a V2 sampler: StatevectorSampler (exact/statevector) or BackendSamplerV2 (hardware/Aer). V2 uses the PUB API: result = sampler.run([(circuit, params)]).result(); counts = result[0].data.<register>.get_counts().

The V1 Estimator was removed in 2.0. Use a V2 estimator: StatevectorEstimator (exact) or BackendEstimatorV2. V2 uses the PUB API: result = estimator.run([(circuit, observable)]).result(); value = result[0].data.evs.
